backend/main.mo: Main backend actor for the Aditi Electricals employee management system, implementing worker management, attendance tracking, salary records, notes, announcements, and holidays with access control, blob storage, and owner/worker role-based authorization.
backend/migration.mo: Defines a simple migration module that initializes the new actor state with a null owner principal during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the frontend actor hook always uses the authenticated Internet Identity agent and guards mutation calls until the actor is fully initialized with the identity.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS color tokens for both light and dark themes, plus base body and border styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Aditi Electricals PWA, including meta tags, manifest link, Inter font preload, and the React app root div.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Aditi Electricals defining app name, icons, standalone display mode, and theme/background colors.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker providing offline caching for static assets, push notification display, and notification click handling for the PWA.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component that orchestrates Internet Identity login after PIN auth, registers the owner principal on the backend once the authenticated actor is ready, and renders the appropriate owner or worker layout based on user role.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceCalend: A monthly calendar component that displays attendance records (present, absent, leave, holiday) for a worker with navigation controls and per-month stats. Supports clickable days for owners to add/edit attendance entries.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: A sticky top navigation header with role-based nav links (owner vs worker), a mobile hamburger menu, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/layout/OwnerLayo: A full-page layout for the owner role featuring a sticky header, collapsible sidebar with nav items (Dashboard, Workers, Attendance, Salary, Notes, Holidays), and a main content area.
frontend/src/components/layout/WorkerLay: A full-page layout for the worker role with a sticky header, collapsible sidebar with nav items (Dashboard, Attendance, Salary, Notes), and a main content area.
frontend/src/components/notes/AddNoteMod: Modal dialog for creating a new note, supporting note type selection, content input, and optional photo upload with progress tracking. Handles both owner and worker roles with different available note types.
frontend/src/components/notes/EditNoteMo: Modal dialog for editing an existing note's content and photo, allowing replacement or removal of the existing photo with upload progress support.
frontend/src/components/notes/NoteCard.t: Displays a single note with its type badge, content, optional photo, author, and timestamp, with conditional edit/delete buttons based on user role.
frontend/src/components/owner/AddWorkerM: Modal form for adding a new worker with name, mobile, and salary fields, showing a success message with the generated worker ID on completion.
frontend/src/components/owner/Announceme: Modal for managing announcements, supporting create, edit, and delete operations with an inline form and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/owner/EditWorker: Modal dialog for editing an existing worker's name, mobile, salary, and active status, with success and error feedback.
frontend/src/components/owner/TodayAtten: Displays today's worker attendance locations on an embedded OpenStreetMap iframe, with a list of worker GPS cards below the map. Filters out records without GPS data and shows a placeholder when none are available.
frontend/src/components/PINChangeModal.t: A modal dialog for changing a worker's PIN, supporting both self-service and owner-initiated PIN changes with validation for current PIN, minimum length, and confirmation match.
frontend/src/components/salary/SalaryBre: Renders a detailed salary breakdown card for a given SalaryRecord, computing per-day rate, deductions, and net pay, and displaying them in a styled card with highlighted rows.
frontend/src/components/worker/TwoPMConf: Shows a modal popup after 2 PM prompting the worker to confirm they have resumed work after lunch, polling every minute and dismissing once confirmed via the confirmTwoPM mutation.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context supporting owner and worker login via employee ID and PIN, persisting session in sessionStorage, and exposing helpers for updating name, PIN, and UI language.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token, and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login status, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, workers, attendance, salary, notes, announcements, and holidays using TanStack Query's useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, imports the Inter font, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system including colors, spacing, and component-specific tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page component that authenticates workers and owners by matching an employee ID and PIN against the fetched worker list.
frontend/src/pages/owner/AttendanceManag: Owner page for viewing and managing worker attendance records via a calendar UI, supporting add, update, and delete operations with location preview.
frontend/src/pages/owner/Holidays.tsx: Owner page for managing company holidays, providing forms to add, edit, and delete holiday entries displayed in a sorted list.
Owner dashboard page showing today's attendance overview with present/absent stats, a map of present workers' GPS locations, and quick-navigation cards. Fetches workers, today's attendance, and confirmations via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/owner/OwnerNotes.tsx: Owner notes management page supporting create, edit, delete, and photo-attachment of notes with camera or gallery, filterable by note type and worker. Uses tabbed UI with search and renders notes in cards.
frontend/src/pages/owner/SalaryManagemen: Salary management page for owners to create or update monthly salary records per worker, calculating net pay from monthly salary, cut days, advances, carry-forward, and company holidays. Includes month navigation and a worker selector.
frontend/src/pages/owner/SalaryWorkerVie: Read-only salary detail view for a single worker showing a monthly breakdown of salary, deductions, advance, and net pay with previous/next month navigation.
frontend/src/pages/owner/WorkerDetail.ts: Detailed worker profile page for owners with tabs for attendance calendar, notes, and salary, plus a dialog showing attendance record details including an embedded OpenStreetMap location preview.
frontend/src/pages/owner/WorkerManagemen: Owner-facing page for managing workers, supporting add, delete, edit, and search operations with error handling and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Profile page allowing users to update their display name, change their PIN, and set a profile photo via camera capture or gallery upload.
frontend/src/pages/worker/WorkerAttendan: Worker-facing attendance marking page that captures a photo via camera or gallery, retrieves GPS coordinates, and submits attendance records.
frontend/src/pages/worker/WorkerDashboar: Worker dashboard displaying today's attendance status, 2PM confirmation state, and basic worker profile info with a confirmation popup trigger.
frontend/src/pages/worker/WorkerNotes.ts: Worker notes page allowing workers to view, create, edit, and delete personal notes with optional photo attachments via camera or gallery.
frontend/src/pages/worker/WorkerSalary.t: Worker salary page showing a monthly salary breakdown including deductions, advance, and net pay with month navigation controls.
frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts: Utility functions for date/time operations including today's date string, month/year helpers, attendance window checks, formatting, and timestamp conversion.
frontend/src/utils/registerServiceWorker: Registers a service worker, requests notification permissions, and schedules daily push notifications (at 9:00, 9:15, and 14:00) for attendance reminders using the Service Worker and Notification APIs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps design tokens (colors, border radius, shadows, fonts) to CSS variables, disables dark mode, and registers the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for the Aditi Electricals workforce management app, documenting a critical bug where the backend rejects Owner-role actions due to broken principal comparison in the authorization middleware, along with pending fix requests for owner validation and initialization flow.
